# Site Architecture
- /: Home page - Welcome to the Smart Attendance System
- /dashboard: User dashboard - Access attendance records and manage users
- /login: User login - Dashboard Login
- /register: User registration
- /setup-wizard: Setup wizard for first-time configuration
- /add_photos: Add user photos
- /train: Train facial recognition models
- /mark_your_attendance: Mark Time-In - Clock in for the day
- /mark_your_attendance_out: Mark Time-Out - Clock out when you're done
- /attendance_session: Active attendance session
- /view_attendance_home: View attendance home
- /view_attendance_date: View attendance by date
- /view_attendance_employee: View attendance by employee
- /view_my_attendance: View personal attendance records
- /mark-attendance: Mark attendance in the SPA
- /attendance: View attendance in the SPA
- /session: Active attendance session in the SPA
- /add-photos: Add user photos in the SPA
- /employees/register: Register a new employee in the SPA
